title: Exxon Is Nearing a Deal to Pump Oil in Venezuela, Marking a Victory for Trump
summary_full: The U.S. oil giant is negotiating a deal to pump oil in Venezuela, ending a standoff with its socialist rulers and marking a victory for President Trump.
summary_public: The U.S. oil giant is negotiating a deal to pump oil in Venezuela, ending a standoff with its socialist rulers and marking a victory for President Trump.
